ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum number of seconds that must pass from the previous edit to store a new edit, set to 0 to disable. Modifications done between those seconds will be merged into the next edit, reducing the edit history file size at the expense of less history granularity.
ast.target: 存储新编辑必须距离上次编辑经过的最少秒数，设为 0 以禁用。在此时间间隔内所做的修改将合并到下一次编辑中，以减少编辑历史文件大小，但会降低历史记录的详细程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of edits to keep, set to 0 for no limit. Older edits will be deleted from the history in the next update, reducing the edit history file size at the expense of less history.
ast.target: 保留的最大编辑数量，设为 0 表示无限制。超出限制时，较旧的编辑将在下次更新时从历史记录中删除，以减少编辑历史文件大小，但会减少历史记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Oldest edit to keep in seconds, eg set to 3600 to delete edits that are more than one hour old, set to 0 for no limit. Older edits will be deleted from the history in the next update, reducing the edit history file size at the expense of less history.
ast.target: 保留的最旧编辑时间（秒），例如设为 3600 可删除超过一小时的编辑，设为 0 表示无限制。较旧的编辑将在下次更新时从历史记录中删除，以减少编辑历史文件大小，但会减少历史记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum size of the history file in kilobytes, set to 0 for no limit. When over the size, edits will be deleted from the history in the next update, older edits first, reducing the edit history file size at the expense of less history.
ast.target: 历史文件的最大大小（千字节），设为 0 表示无限制。超出大小时，将从历史记录中删除编辑，优先删除较旧的编辑，以减少编辑历史文件大小，但会减少历史记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Comma separated list of file extensions to store edits for (case insensitive). Empty to store edits for all files.
Note if an extension is removed, old edit history files will need to be removed manually.
ast.target:
存储编辑的文件扩展名列表（以逗号分隔，不区分大小写）。留空则为所有文件存储编辑。
注意：如果移除了某个扩展名，需要手动删除旧的编辑历史文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Comma separated list of substrings of note filepaths to not store edits for (case insensitive). Empty to store edits for all files.
Use forward slashes as folder separator
Note if a substring is added, old edit history files will need to be removed manually.
ast.target:
不存储编辑的笔记文件路径子字符串列表（以逗号分隔，不区分大小写）。留空则为所有文件存储编辑。
使用正斜杠作为文件夹分隔符
注意：如果添加了某个子字符串，需要手动删除旧的编辑历史文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show edit history file information on the status bar. Click the status bar to show the edit history for the current file.
ast.target: 在状态栏显示编辑历史文件信息。点击状态栏可显示当前文件的编辑历史。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In the diff view, display the diff raw, timeline, inline, horizontally (side by side), or vertically (top by bottom).
ast.target: 在差异视图中，以原始格式、时间线、内联、水平（并排）或垂直（上下）方式显示差异。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show whitespace in the diff view.
ast.target: 在差异视图中显示空白字符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Messages to show in the javascript console.
ast.target: 在 JavaScript 控制台中显示的消息。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum size of the history file (KB)

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 文件路径子字符串黑名单

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open edit history for this file
ast.target: 打开此文件的编辑历史

ast.name: name
ast.source: Save current edit in the edit history
ast.target: 在编辑历史中保存当前编辑
